name: set_presence_lock
description: Sets or updates the presence lock status for a home, controlling whether geofencing-based presence detection is enabled or locked to a specific state (HOME or AWAY). This allows users to override automatic geofencing detection and manually lock the system into a home or away mode, affecting how the heating system responds to occupancy.

home_id.description: The unique identifier of the home installation

home_presence.description: The presence state to lock the home into. HOME indicates the home is occupied; AWAY indicates the home is unoccupied.
